creator: alt2600@icloud.com
text:
(In reply to rozhuk.im from comment #5)

my apologies, you are correct, I scanned my console window too quick and got confused. I added WITH_IPP to the CMAKE_OFF list and it is building so far with ATLAS. 

perhaps it can be pre-downloaded like the other third party libraries are being downloaded so they can be patched like the other ones are being down with those post-extract statements so patches can apply. I don't know what this IPP thing is other then some kind of intel optimizations. Not sure they are important or not.
